ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the species (e.g., Ducks/Geese/Waterfowl) */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order of the species */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family of the species */,
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genus of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_genus_id FOREIGN KEY ("genus_id") REFERENCES genera ("genus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_name" TEXT /* Name of the order (e.g., Anseriformes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family (e.g., Anatidae) */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order of the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genera" (
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genus */,
  "genus_name" TEXT /* Name of the genus (e.g., Anser) */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family of the genus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genera_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "morphological_data" (
  "morph_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each morphological data entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species associated with this data */,
  "min_length" REAL /* Minimum length of the species in cm */,
  "max_length" REAL /* Maximum length of the species in cm */,
  "min_body_mass" REAL /* Minimum body mass of the species in grams */,
  "max_body_mass" REAL /* Maximum body mass of the species in grams */,
  "min_wingspan" REAL /* Minimum wingspan of the species in cm */,
  "max_wingspan" REAL /* Maximum wingspan of the species in cm */,
  "beak_length" REAL /* Length of the beak in cm */,
  "leg_length" REAL /* Length of the leg in cm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("morph_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_morphological_data_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat (e.g., Wetlands) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_data" (
  "geo_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic data entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species associated with this data */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Geographic distribution (e.g., Migratory, Resident) */,
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_data_habitat_id FOREIGN KEY ("habitat_id") REFERENCES habitats ("habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_data_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_statuses" (
  "cons_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation status */,
  "cons_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the conservation status (e.g., LC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the conservation status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cons_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_cons_statuses" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "cons_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conservation status */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the conservation status record */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Population size of the species in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id", "cons_status_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who published */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species studied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)
